briefdescription.para: CPU vector flag: Boot address (cold boot/reset)
CPU vector flag: Start address (warm start)
CPU vector flag: Resume address (exit from suspend)
CPU domain protocol command message IDs.
Send the CPU_SLEEP_MODE_SET command and get its reply.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to structure containing configuration to be set

briefdescription.para: Send the SCMI_NXP_CPU_DOMAIN_MSG_CPU_PD_LPM_CONFIG_SET command and get its reply.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to structure containing configuration to be set

briefdescription.para: Send the CPU_IRQ_WAKE_SET command and get its reply.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to structure containing configuration to be set

briefdescription.para: Send the CPU_RESET_VECTOR_SET command and get its reply.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to structure containing configuration to be set

briefdescription.para: Send the CPU_INFO_GET command and get its reply.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to structure to receive CPU information (output)
